items.title: Truist Securities Maintains Caterpillar (CAT) Buy Recommendation
This Dow Jones Stock Rallies As Analysts Raise Price Targets
items.description: Truist raised its price target to 582 from 507 on Wednesday and kept a buy rating as the firm previewed third-quarter results in the sector.

items.title: Why Caterpillar (CAT) Stock Is Trading Up Today
items.description: Shares of construction equipment company Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT) jumped 4% in the afternoon session after several investment firms raised their price targets on the stock, citing strong profit margins and steady demand. Truist Securities increased its price target to $582 from $507 while keeping a "Buy" rating. Jefferies also lifted its price target. Analysts at Truist pointed to the company's $35 billion backlog as clear proof of strong, sustained demand that could support long-term growth. The

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Higher As Fed Report Looms; Nvidia Rises Amid Musk Deal (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow rises on the stock market today with Nvidia reportedly investing in Elon Musk's xAI. Rocket Lab, AST Space jump on news.

items.title: Dutch Pension Fund ABP Sells Its $454.43 Million Holding in Caterpillar Inc. (CAT); Oppenheimer Reiterated Its Outperform Rating
items.description: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) is one of the 10 Best Non-Tech Stocks to Buy According to Reddit, supported by hedge fund interest. According to national broadcaster NOS, Dutch pension fund ABP stated on October 1 that it has sold its $454.43 million holding in Caterpillar Inc.
